tr.td: 1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Acetaminophen 300 mg and hydrocodone bitartrate 5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (300 mg/5 mg) by mouth every 4 to 6 hours as needed for pain
Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
400 micrograms (1 spray) under the tongue as needed for chest pain, may repeat every 5 minutes as needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product

ul.li: Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Patient will verbalize understanding of prediabetes, including diet, exercise, and blood glucose monitoring strategies.
Patient will achieve and maintain HbA1c below 5.7% to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.
Patient will achieve a 5% reduction in body weight through dietary changes and increased physical activity.
Patient will achieve fasting plasma glucose below 100 mg/dL.
Patient will engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week.

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily

text.value: 1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily

Patient will verbalize understanding of prediabetes, including diet, exercise, and blood glucose monitoring strategies.
Patient will achieve and maintain HbA1c below 5.7% to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.
Patient will achieve a 5% reduction in body weight through dietary changes and increased physical activity.
Patient will achieve fasting plasma glucose below 100 mg/dL.
Patient will engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week.
